title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for successful Claude Code projects inspired by Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan, covering what not to build and the six moves to lead an AI team. The guidance is drawn from his experience scaling a $25M+ startup and helping non-technical founders build profitable applications.
